overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Origins showing a character walking through the Temple of Apis in ancient Egypt. The character proceeds along a hieroglyphic-lined processional way with sphinx statues, enters the temple, and explores the main sanctuary featuring a massive bull statue surrounded by worshippers.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered processional way with hieroglyphic walls

events.description: slight turn to the right while continuing forward along the corridor

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the temple corridor, passing by colorful hieroglyphic walls and massive sphinx statues

notable_agents.action: temple guard standing at attention near the hieroglyphic wall
civilian walking ahead toward the temple entrance

entered.detail: white limestone wall covered in colorful Egyptian hieroglyphics and painted figures
white limestone wall covered in colorful Egyptian hieroglyphics and painted figures
massive dark stone sphinx statue with gold painted accents and headdress

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a grand processional way lined with white walls covered in vibrant hieroglyphics. Massive sphinx statues flank the path, and decorative urns with palm trees mark the approach to the temple entrance. The corridor is semi-covered with open sky above, casting sharp shadows on the patterned floor.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow entry corridor leading to main sanctuary

events.description: entering the indoor temple from the outdoor processional way through a stone archway
moving from brighter entrance into darker interior space with columns

agents.ego_description: walking through the narrow entrance corridor into the main temple hall, approaching the massive bull statue

notable_agents.action: temple guard standing at the entrance doorway holding a spear

entered.detail: large stone doorway with hieroglyphic inscriptions and guardian statues
massive black stone bull statue on raised pedestal, visible at end of corridor
tall stone column with blue and gold painted capitals and hieroglyphic bands
tall stone column with blue and gold painted capitals and hieroglyphic bands

segments.scene_description: The character enters the temple through a narrow corridor, transitioning from bright outdoor light to dimmer interior space. Tall painted columns line the path as the massive Apis bull statue becomes visible in the distance. The walls continue to display hieroglyphics as the space narrows before opening ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: main sanctuary with central bull statue altar

events.description: entering the main sanctuary hall with the giant bull statue and worshippers
camera circles around the bull statue to view it from different angles

agents.ego_description: walking around the massive bull statue, observing worshippers praying and making offerings at the altar

notable_agents.action: worshipper kneeling in prayer at the base of the bull statue
worshipper kneeling with arms raised toward the statue

entered.detail: decorated stone base with hieroglyphic inscriptions and burning incense braziers
scattered flower petals, greenery, and ritual items on red carpet around the base
white linen fabric hanging between columns, diffusing light from above

segments.scene_description: The character enters the vast sanctuary dominated by the colossal Apis bull statue standing on an ornate pedestal. Worshippers kneel in prayer among scattered flower petals and burning incense. The camera circles the statue, revealing white fabric canopies hanging between painted columns and a skylight above illuminating the sacred space.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a bright, open-air processional way into the dim, sacred depths of a grand Egyptian sanctuary. It begins by tracking along a grand path lined with white walls of vibrant hieroglyphics and massive sphinx statues under a bright sky. As the character moves forward, the scene transitions through a narrow corridor where the sharp outdoor light fades into a dimmer interior framed by tall painted columns. The space then opens wide into a vast sanctuary dominated by a colossal Apis bull statue on an ornate pedestal, surrounded by kneeling worshippers and burning incense. Finally, the camera circles the sacred monument, revealing white fabric canopies and a central skylight that casts a divine glow over the flower-strewn floor.
